title: T-036 — Reference.Allergens + Allergens_by_RM + Allergens_added_by_Process schemas + EU14 seed
prompt:
# T-036 — Allergen reference schemas + EU14 seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §8.2, §8.3, §8.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 3 allergen reference tables and seed the EU14 list per Reg 1169/2011.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0040 emits Reference.Allergens (with regulatory_framework, display_name pl/uk/ro), Reference.Allergens_by_RM (UNIQUE tenant_id+ingredient_codes+allergen_code), Reference.Allergens_added_by_Process. RLS for all 3. Seed file emits 14 EU allergens for given tenant. Drizzle schemas.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0040_allergen_references.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/allergens.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/allergens-eu14.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/allergens.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0040 ran and EU14 seed executed for tenant T1, when SELECT count(*) FROM "Reference.Allergens" WHERE tenant_id=T1, then count=14
2. Given Reference.Allergens_by_RM with row (tenant_id=T1, ingredient_codes='RM1939', allergen_code='gluten'), when inserting same triple again, then UNIQUE constraint rejects
3. Given seed completed, when SELECT WHERE allergen_code='gluten', then regulatory_framework='EU_FIC_1169_2011' and display_name_pl='Gluten'

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering count, UNIQUE, seed values
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:allergens-eu14 && pnpm --filter db test allergens'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS on any of 3 tables
- Do not seed without tenant_id
- Do not change EU14 list (regulatory)
